name: JellTogether
description: The ultimate social watch party plugin for Jellyfin. Features synchronized playback, VR immersive mode, interactive polls, real-time reactions, and collaborative queueing.
overview: Host high-fidelity watch parties with virtual cinema seats, theory boards, and synchronized playback for the ultimate social movie night.

versions.changelog: Expose the JellTogether page in Jellyfin navigation and fix embedded web asset loading.
